exam_name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Insights - Journeys Functional Consultant
certification_name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Insights - Journeys Functional Consultant
exam_price_notes: Exam pricing may vary by region and is not specified in the provided text.

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Insights - Journeys functional consultants
recommended_experience: Some knowledge of marketing principles and the Dynamics 365 Customer Insights - Journeys application's role within the Dynamics 365 suite of applications, including interoperability with Dynamics 365 Customer Insights - Data, Microsoft Power Platform, Dynamics 365 Customer Voice, Dynamics 365 Sales, and Microsoft Teams.

prerequisites.description: Implementing solutions that engage with and convert leads, orchestrate marketing experiences, personalize marketing messaging, and deliver marketing insights.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Configure the Customer Insights - Journeys app
sub_objectives: Configure forms, including adding columns to forms and changing form layouts
Configure views, including adding columns to views
Create and configure columns in tables
Configure SMS providers, including Microsoft Azure Communication Services

objectives.title: Create and manage segments
sub_objectives: Create segments by using Copilot Query Assist
Combine segments by using union, exclude, or intersect logic
Create a segment within a customer journey

objectives.title: Manage preference centers
sub_objectives: Describe how consent is managed and enforced for email and text messages

objectives.title: Manage leads
sub_objectives: Create and manage lead scoring models

objectives.title: Create and manage accounts and contacts
sub_objectives: Create and manage activities and activity templates

objectives.title: Create marketing emails
sub_objectives: Describe the HTML editor feature in a marketing email
Create and use reusable content blocks
Validate email content for compliance by using the Accessibility Checker
Check spam scores for email content by using Spam checker
Include iCalendar files and documents from the asset library

objectives.title: Distribute marketing emails
sub_objectives: Send emails without building a journey

objectives.title: Create and manage other channels
sub_objectives: Add SMS keywords to a text message
Include Customer Voice surveys in messages
Implement form capture for externally managed forms
Describe use cases for extending forms by using JavaScript

objectives.title: Configure journey orchestration
sub_objectives: Create a journey by using a segment
Configure a journey by using a trigger
Configure A/B testing and review test results
Configure a business goal and measure progress
Add channel optimization to a journey
Create a trigger for a Dataverse record change
Use a custom trigger to run a Power Automate flow
Track campaigns by using UTM codes

objectives.title: Create and configure events and webinars
sub_objectives: Configure an event as a Microsoft Teams webinar
Configure an event as a Microsoft Teams Live event
Configure event agenda, including sessions and tracks
Manage speakers and event team members
Manage event registrations, including attendee check-in and cancellations
Describe the event management dashboard and event analytics

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn

aliases: microsoft dynamics 365 customer insights - journeys functional consultant
